mapper.sql: id, parent_id, dept_name, dept_code, sort, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_dept WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY parent_id ASC, sort ASC, id ASC

SELECT FROM sys_dept WHERE deleted = 0
AND dept_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.deptName}, '%')
AND status = #{query.status}
ORDER BY parent_id ASC, sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM sys_dept WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_dept WHERE dept_name = #{deptName} AND parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_dept WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_dept (parent_id, dept_name, dept_code, sort, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{deptName}, #{deptCode}, #{sort}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dept SET parent_id = #{parentId}, dept_name = #{deptName}, dept_code = #{deptCode}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_dept SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_dept SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
